messages.content: You are an industrial catalog auditor. Classify each row into one of these categories only: gas_safety, fire_safety, hvac_components, industrial_sensors, valves_actuators, it_hardware, packaging_materials, construction_supplies, toxic_fake, unknown. Return strict JSON only.

{"task": "Reclassify each row with same taxonomy only.", "rules": {"valid_categories": ["construction_supplies", "fire_safety", "gas_safety", "hvac_components", "industrial_sensors", "it_hardware", "packaging_materials", "toxic_fake", "unknown", "valves_actuators"], "output_format": "JSON array only", "required_fields": ["slice_rank", "sku_code", "llm_category", "llm_brand", "confidence", "reason"], "confidence_range": "0..1", "keep_reason_short": true}, "rows": [{"slice_rank": 1, "sku_code": "WDU4ZR", "qty": 6000.0, "effective_usd": 58249511.54208, "category_engine": "unknown", "brand_engine": "unknown", "raw_text": "Маркировка клеммы Wdu4/Zr, мод./арт. 1609900000, кол. 6000", "full_row_text": "Маркировка клеммы Wdu4/Zr, мод./арт. 1609900000, кол. 6000 | nan | nan | nan | nan | nan | nan | nan | nan | nan | nan | nan"}, {"slice_rank": 2, "sku_code": "SF12IV2", "qty": 2800.0, "effective_usd": 27439799.775258, "category_engine": "unknown", "brand_engine": "unknown", "raw_text": "Маркировка кабеля Sf1/2I-V2, мод./арт. 1918630000, кол. 2800", "full_row_text": "Маркировка кабеля Sf1/2I-V2, мод./арт. 1918630000, кол. 2800 | nan | nan | nan | nan | nan | nan | nan | nan | nan | nan | nan"}]}
